title: NAIC Insurance Data Security Model Law
description: Implement comprehensive information security program per NAIC Model Law 668.

title: Cybersecurity Event Notification
description: Notify state insurance commissioner of cybersecurity event within 72 hours.

title: Third-Party Service Provider Oversight
description: Exercise due diligence in selecting third-party service providers per NAIC.

title: Annual Risk Assessment
description: Conduct annual risk assessment of cybersecurity threats and vulnerabilities.

title: CISO Designation
description: Designate qualified Chief Information Security Officer for insurance entity.

title: NAIC Model Audit Rule
description: Comply with NAIC Model Audit Rule for insurance company audited financial statements.

title: Credit for Reinsurance Model Law
description: Apply NAIC Credit for Reinsurance Model Law to ceded reinsurance reporting.

title: Rate Filing Compliance
description: File rates and forms with state insurance department per Filing Model Act.

title: Unfair Trade Practices Act
description: Avoid unfair trade practices per NAIC Unfair Trade Practices Model Act.

title: Unfair Claims Settlement Practices
description: Avoid unfair claims settlement practices per NAIC Model 900.

title: Producer Licensing
description: Verify and maintain producer licensing per NAIC Producer Licensing Model Act.

title: AML Program for Insurance
description: Implement AML program for permanent life insurance and annuity products.

title: Best Interest Standard for Annuities
description: Apply best interest standard to annuity transactions per NAIC Model 275.

title: Suitability in Annuity Transactions
description: Document suitability analysis for annuity recommendations.

title: Privacy of Consumer Financial Info
description: Provide initial and annual privacy notices per NAIC Model 672.

title: Solvency Capital Requirement
description: Maintain SCR coverage above 100% per Solvency II Pillar 1.

title: Own Funds Classification
description: Classify own funds into Tier 1, 2, 3 per Solvency II eligibility criteria.

title: Own Risk and Solvency Assessment
description: Conduct ORSA at least annually with board approval and supervisor submission.

title: Quantitative Reporting Templates
description: Submit quarterly and annual QRTs to supervisory authority via S2 XBRL taxonomy.

title: Solvency and Financial Condition Report
description: Publish annual SFCR per Solvency II disclosure requirements.

title: Actuarial Function Independence
description: Maintain actuarial function with independent assessment of technical provisions.

title: Internal Audit Function
description: Maintain effective internal audit function per Solvency II Article 47.

title: Compliance Function
description: Establish compliance function per Solvency II Article 46.

title: IFRS 17 Measurement Models
description: Apply general measurement model, premium allocation, or variable fee approach per IFRS 17.

title: Contractual Service Margin
description: Calculate and amortize CSM over coverage period per IFRS 17.

title: IFRS 17 Disclosure Requirements
description: Disclose insurance contract revenue and amounts in financial statements per IFRS 17.

title: GLBA Privacy Notice
description: Provide initial and annual privacy notices to insurance consumers.

title: GLBA Safeguards Rule
description: Develop comprehensive information security program for insurance customer data.

title: GLBA Opt-Out Right
description: Provide opt-out for sharing nonpublic personal info with non-affiliated third parties.

title: Health Plan PHI Compliance
description: Apply HIPAA Privacy and Security Rules to health insurance plans handling PHI.

title: Minimum Necessary Standard
description: Limit PHI use to minimum necessary for health insurance operations.

title: HIPAA Breach Notification
description: Notify affected individuals and HHS of PHI breach within 60 days.

title: Affordable Care Act Marketplace
description: Comply with ACA Marketplace rules for qualified health plans.

title: Essential Health Benefits
description: Cover essential health benefits in non-grandfathered plans per ACA.

title: ERISA Plan Compliance
description: Comply with ERISA fiduciary, reporting, and disclosure requirements.

title: ERISA SPD Distribution
description: Distribute Summary Plan Description to participants per ERISA Section 102.

title: Form 5500 Filing
description: File Form 5500 annually for ERISA plans.

title: Lawful Basis for Insurance Data
description: Document lawful basis for processing personal data in insurance products.

title: Special Category Data Processing
description: Establish Article 9 condition for processing health data in insurance underwriting.

title: DSAR Response Within One Month
description: Respond to data subject access requests within one month with two-month extension option.

title: Right to Erasure With Retention
description: Honor right to erasure subject to legitimate retention for claims defense.

title: Underwriting Automated Decisions
description: Provide right not to be subject to solely automated underwriting decisions with legal effects.

title: 72-Hour Breach Notification
description: Notify supervisory authority of personal data breach within 72 hours.

title: International Insurance Data Transfers
description: Use SCCs or adequacy decisions for cross-border insurance data transfers.

title: Security Trust Services Criteria
description: Implement controls aligned with AICPA TSC Common Criteria for security.

title: Confidentiality Controls
description: Identify, classify, and protect confidential insurance customer information.

title: Role-Based Access for Insurance
description: Implement RBAC for underwriters, adjusters, and customer service representatives.

title: Continuous Monitoring of Insurance Systems
description: Continuously monitor policy / claim / payment system access with automated alerting.

title: Insurance ISMS
description: Establish ISMS scope covering policy, claim, and customer master systems.

title: Insurance Data Encryption
description: Apply ISO 27001 cryptographic controls to insurance customer data.

title: Illinois Biometric Insurance Use
description: Obtain written consent before collecting biometric identifiers in IL insurance.

title: ADA Title III Insurance Web Access
description: Meet ADA Title III accessibility for insurance customer portals.

title: WCAG 2.1 Level AA
description: Meet WCAG 2.1 Level AA accessibility for insurance portals.

title: FCRA for Insurance Credit Scoring
description: Apply FCRA to insurance credit scoring with adverse action notices.

title: FACTA Red Flags Rule
description: Implement Identity Theft Prevention Program for insurance accounts.

title: TCPA Insurance Outreach
description: Comply with TCPA before automated insurance marketing via SMS or auto-dialer.

title: CAN-SPAM Insurance Email
description: Comply with CAN-SPAM Act for commercial insurance email.

title: California Consumer Privacy Rights
description: Honor CCPA rights for California insurance customers.

title: CPRA Sensitive PI Limitation
description: Honor CPRA right to limit use of sensitive personal information.

title: NYDFS Part 500 Cybersecurity
description: Comply with NYDFS 23 NYCRR Part 500 cybersecurity requirements.

title: Insurance Holding Company Act
description: Comply with NAIC Insurance Holding Company System Regulatory Act.

title: Form B Annual Disclosure
description: File Form B annual holding company disclosure with state insurance department.

title: Captive Insurance Compliance
description: Comply with captive insurance regulation in domicile state for captive insurers.

title: EU AI Act for Insurance AI
description: Classify life and health insurance AI as high-risk per EU AI Act Annex III.

title: AI System Transparency
description: Inform customers when interacting with AI systems and provide transparency labels.

title: Insurance Distribution Directive
description: Comply with EU IDD for insurance product distribution including IPID.

title: PRIIPs Key Information Document
description: Provide KID for packaged retail and insurance-based investment products.

title: OFAC Insurance Customer Screening
description: Screen insurance customers and beneficiaries against OFAC SDN list.

title: FATCA Insurance Reporting
description: Report insurance contracts of US persons per FATCA where applicable.

title: CRS for Cash Value Insurance
description: Report cash value insurance contracts of foreign tax residents per CRS.

title: Cyber Insurance War Exclusion
description: Apply NMA 2914 war exclusion clause uniformly across cyber insurance underwriting.

title: State Auto Insurance Minimum Limits
description: Verify minimum auto insurance liability limits per state.

title: State Workers' Compensation Compliance
description: Comply with state workers' compensation requirements for employer policies.

title: Title Insurance Regulation
description: Comply with state title insurance rate filings and licensing.

title: Surplus Lines Compliance
description: Comply with NRRA surplus lines tax allocation and broker licensing.

title: Reinsurance Collateral Requirements
description: Apply NAIC collateral requirements for cession to non-US reinsurers.

title: Insurance Fraud Reporting
description: Report insurance fraud to state fraud bureau per state law requirements.

title: OFAC Compliance in Claims
description: Screen claimants and payees against OFAC SDN list before claim payment.

title: ERISA Investment Advice Fiduciary
description: Apply ERISA fiduciary standards to investment advice for retirement plans.

title: ORSA Summary Report
description: File ORSA Summary Report annually with lead state regulator.

title: Solvency II Governance System
description: Establish effective system of governance providing sound and prudent management.

title: Fit and Proper Requirements
description: Ensure fit and proper requirements for persons running insurance undertaking.

title: Outsourcing of Critical Functions
description: Notify supervisor of outsourcing critical or important operational functions.

title: Prudent Investment Standard
description: Apply prudent person principle to insurance asset investments per Solvency II Article 132.

title: SFDR Sustainability Disclosure
description: Disclose sustainability risk integration per Sustainable Finance Disclosure Regulation.

title: EU Taxonomy Alignment
description: Disclose EU Taxonomy alignment for sustainable economic activities.

title: Underwriting Non-Discrimination
description: Avoid prohibited discriminatory underwriting per state and federal civil rights law.

title: Mental Health Parity and Addiction Equity
description: Apply mental health parity to group health plans per MHPAEA.

title: No Surprises Act Compliance
description: Comply with No Surprises Act for out-of-network billing protections.

title: Preventive Services Coverage
description: Cover ACA preventive services without cost-sharing in non-grandfathered plans.

title: Statutory Reserves Adequacy
description: Maintain statutory reserves per Actuarial Opinion and Memorandum Regulation.

title: Risk-Based Capital Calculation
description: Calculate and report Risk-Based Capital per NAIC formula.

title: Anti-Rebating Laws
description: Avoid prohibited rebates and inducements per state anti-rebating laws.

title: Replacement of Life Insurance
description: Comply with NAIC Life Insurance and Annuities Replacement Model Regulation.

title: Insurance Form Filing
description: File insurance forms and rates with state insurance department before use.

title: Telematics Data Privacy
description: Apply state-specific telematics data privacy rules for usage-based auto insurance.

title: Insurance Regulatory Sandbox
description: Use state regulatory sandbox programs for insurtech innovation testing.

title: Annuity Best Interest Documentation
description: Document best interest considerations for annuity recommendations per Reg BI.

title: COBRA Continuation Coverage
description: Provide COBRA continuation coverage to qualified beneficiaries.

title: State Insurance Mandates
description: Apply state-specific insurance mandates for covered services.
